story.title: Writing by hand is good for your brain

draft:
I just read that writing by hand can improve my coding skills. 
As someone who spends most of their day on a keyboard, I'm intrigued by the idea that handwriting can boost cognitive abilities. 
This could be especially useful for debugging and problem-solving.
Will handwriting become a part of my daily routine?
#AI #SoftwareDevelopment #Handwriting
